form.share_privacy: Anonymous to readers. Reviewed by our team before it goes public — please don't include passport numbers, account numbers, or other personal identifiers.
form.refusal_label: How many times were you refused before approval?
form.wrong_placeholder: e.g. Bank statement only covered 6 weeks, and the officer cited insufficient ties to home country.
form.fixed_placeholder: e.g. Waited 4 months to build a clean statement history and added a cover letter addressing ties directly.
form.success_toast: Thank you! Your story will appear once reviewed by our team.
form.error_toast: Could not submit your story. Please try again.
page.title: Rejection Wall of Fame
page.subtitle: Real, anonymous stories from applicants who were refused — and later approved. What went wrong, and exactly what they fixed.
page.signin_prompt: Sign in to share your story (this keeps the Wall of Fame spam-free).
page.empty: No stories yet for this filter. Be the first to share yours.
